results.title: How innovation labs are powering GCC public and private transformation
results.description: A major transformation has been brewing in the GCC region as innovation labs transform from symbolic spaces into critical operational hubs, according to a whitepaper from regional consultancy firm New Metrics.

results.title: Keep leadership at the center of technology transformation
results.description: Research across industries and transformation programs consistently shows that leadership is one of the most critical determinants of successful change. Cantekin Ertekin, Managing Partner at ITGT Consultancy, shares his perspective on why this is even more true in the context of strategic IT transformation.
